name: Potstickers
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix all ingredients together by hand.
2. Fill wonton wrappers with approximately 1 - 1 1/2 teaspoons of filling and press firmly in wonton press. Moisten the edges for better adhering.
3. Heat vegetable oil (add 1 drop of sesame oil) in a pan over medium heat. Once hot, add the wontons and sauté until the bottoms are golden.
4. Add enough chicken broth to cover the wontons partially. Cover the pan and simmer for approximately 8-10 minutes.
5. Serve immediately with a dipping sauce made from: 2 parts soy sauce, 1 part rice vinegar, a little grated ginger, and some chopped green onion.
